response.step_by_step_log: The video displays a static image of four anime-style characters (Hololive 3rd Generation: Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine) with the title '#きゅるるん大作戦〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜' overlaid. Text at the bottom indicates the 'sneak peek' of a show has ended. Background music is playing. Since it is a background track for a static screen promoting a concert/EP, and no specific song title is credited beyond the concert title itself, I have treated the background music as part of the overall promotional theme. I performed a search for '#きゅるるん大作戦' to find if it's a specific song, but it appears to be the name of a concert/EP. As no specific vocal song is clearly identified as the music playing in the video segment, I am indicating `contains_vocal_music` as `false` for the duration.
response.global_summary: A static end-card screen for a Hololive 3rd Generation concert/EP, '#きゅるるん大作戦 〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜', with background music.

scenes.description: Static image of four Hololive 3rd Gen VTubers with event title text at the center and bottom.
